plan.title: Wire + flip every remaining Python gate in tasks/verify.yml + the two root-Taskfile gates

narratives.Description: tasks/verify.yml is the single largest cluster of unflipped live-Python gates (verify-stubs, validate-links, rule-ownership-lint, verify_scm_boundary, verify_capacity, verify_session_ritual, preflight_gh self-test, preflight_cache), and Taskfile.yml carries two more (validate_strategy_output, verify_no_task_runtime). Their TS modules exist under packages/core/src/{verify-source,validate-content,session,verify-env}. This story exposes the missing verbs and flips the gate cmds. It exclusively owns tasks/verify.yml and the two named root-Taskfile gate lines, so it is conflict-isolated from the other stories except the additive dispatch switch.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. For each gate lacking a verb (verify-stubs, validate-links, rule-ownership-lint, verify-scm-boundary, verify-capacity, verify-session-ritual, validate-strategy, plus preflight-gh self-test and preflight-cache if a core module exists; otherwise note in the PR which still need a port), add a dispatch.ts case delegating to the existing core module. 2. Repoint the cmds in tasks/verify.yml and the validate_strategy_output / verify_no_task_runtime lines in Taskfile.yml to bin.js verbs. 3. Run task verify:scm-boundary, task verify:encoding, and the relevant parity harnesses (verify-source-parity, validate-content-parity, session-parity, verify-env-parity) to confirm CLEAN, and add a CHANGELOG entry.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft maintainer, I want all verify.yml gates to execute on the TS dispatcher, so that the gate-suite Python scripts become unreferenced before the #1731 delete.

items.title: Given `task verify:scm-boundary`, `task verify:capacity`, `task verify:session-ritual`, `task verify-stubs`, `task validate:links`, and `task rule:ownership-lint`, when each runs, then it invokes a bin.js verb and not `uv run python`.

narrative.Acceptance: Given `task verify:scm-boundary`, `task verify:capacity`, `task verify:session-ritual`, `task verify-stubs`, `task validate:links`, and `task rule:ownership-lint`, when each runs, then it invokes a bin.js verb and not `uv run python`.

items.title: Given the parity harnesses verify-source-parity, validate-content-parity, session-parity, and verify-env-parity, when task ts:parity-all runs, then all remain CLEAN.

narrative.Acceptance: Given the parity harnesses verify-source-parity, validate-content-parity, session-parity, and verify-env-parity, when task ts:parity-all runs, then all remain CLEAN.

items.title: Given `grep -rE 'uv .*run python' tasks/verify.yml`, when run, then it returns no matches.

narrative.Acceptance: Given `grep -rE 'uv .*run python' tasks/verify.yml`, when run, then it returns no matches.

references.title: Issue #1854: feat(ts-migration): Wave 8.6 -- finish the partial Python->TS live flip (precondition for #1731 delete)
